# Indaga-agent

> Local-first, multi-omic personal-health agent runtime. One persistent Active Health Index, one
> evidence-envelope honesty contract, one dispatcher + per-capability skills — across genome, labs,
> wearables, CGM, and derived metrics. The agent backend for the Indaga product.

## Core rules

- For install/setup, read INSTALL_FOR_AGENTS.md first and follow it.
- Base tools (`indaga.*` + each capability's entry tool) appear in MCP `tools/list` directly.
  Every other tool is reached via `indaga.invoke({"tool": "<name>", "params": {...}})` after reading
  the capability's `skills/<capability>/SKILL.md`.
- Every result carries an `evidence_envelope`. Read it and answer at exactly its strength.
  `finding_state` ∈ {evidence_present, not_observed_in_consulted_scope, not_measured, not_assessed,
  blocked_missing_library, index_incomplete, true_negative_supported}.
- ABSENCE IS NEVER "NORMAL". `negative_inference.allowed` is almost always false. `not_measured`
  (lab never drawn / sensor stale) and `index_incomplete` (metric still calibrating) mean UNKNOWN.
- Derive confidence dynamically from the envelope (grade, coverage, caveats) — never a static default.
- n=1: every query is hard-scoped to one subject. Indaga-agent is wellness decision-support, not diagnosis.

## Documentation

- INSTALL_FOR_AGENTS.md — install + MCP host wiring (start here for setup).
- skills/SKILL.md — the root skill: routing + the honesty contract (the agent's operating rules).
- README.md — what it is + repo layout. AGENTS.md — how to develop it.

## Capabilities (read the SKILL.md before invoking focused tools)

- skills/genome/SKILL.md — DNA from the imputed Active Genome Index: genotype + callability, ClinVar, P/LP screen, computed ACMG/AMP, polygenic scores, in-house PharmCAT PGx, GWAS-Catalog associations, continental ancestry.
- skills/domains/SKILL.md — genome-domain lenses (methylation, hormones, immunity, gut, skin, sleep, longevity, athletic, …).
- skills/nutrigenomics/SKILL.md — interpreted food/nutrient genetics (lactose, caffeine, alcohol, MTHFR, iron, taste).
- skills/circadian/SKILL.md — Biological Clock / Biological Midnight (HR-nadir cosinor; 14-night gating).
- skills/labs/SKILL.md — lab analytes + panel coverage (measurement-present: never-measured ≠ normal).
- skills/metabolic/SKILL.md — CGM glycemic summary (freshness: stale data ≠ current control).
- skills/health-index/SKILL.md — general facts / timeseries / context-pack / provenance / sources / corrections.

## Discovery tools (base)

- `indaga.list_capabilities` — capabilities, their tools, and skill paths.
- `indaga.read_skill({"capability": "<cap>"})` — fetch a SKILL.md for progressive disclosure.
- `indaga.describe_context` — the subject's connected sources + fact count + capabilities.

## Single-fetch

For a no-navigation context dump, fetch llms-full.txt (this file + the root and capability skills inlined).
